full_text:
He Miao 何苗
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Miao (何苗)was born in Wan City, Nanyang Commandery. Empress He’s older half-brother. Later killed by Wu Kuang. He Miao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. He Miao lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
